owner_direction: No further mouse calibration runs. Treat 1000 Hz as sufficient for the current calibration host, accept user-entered DPI, in-game sensitivity, and configured polling rate, and proceed to P0-R4.
scientific_limitation: This waiver does not convert either failed strict confirmation into a statistical pass and does not claim universal 1000 Hz physical delivery. Windows WM_INPUT receipt bursts remain visible diagnostics.
production_safeguards: Hardware DPI and current in-game sensitivity remain validated user inputs.
Configured polling rate is user-entered supporting metadata.
Actual raw-event cadence is measured and stored per session.
Duplicate or reversed timestamps are rejected.
The nominal cadence must remain the modal interval class.
Raw evidence is preserved and resampling never bridges detected gaps.
